inputs.label: Selling Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The price at which each unit is sold to customers.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price at which each unit is sold to customers.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis, zu dem jede Einheit an Kunden verkauft wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix auquel chaque unité est vendue aux clients.
businessContext_i18n.es: El precio al que se vende cada unidad a los clientes.

inputs.label: Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The direct material or purchase cost incurred for each unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: The direct material or purchase cost incurred for each unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her birim için katlanılan doğrudan malzeme veya satın alma maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die direkten Material- oder Einkaufskosten, die pro Einheit anfallen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le coût direct des matériaux ou d'achat encouru pour chaque unité.
businessContext_i18n.es: El costo directo de material o compra incurrido por cada unidad.

inputs.label: Units Sold
inputs.businessContext: The total quantity of units sold in the period under consideration.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total quantity of units sold in the period under consideration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İncelenen dönemde satılan toplam birim miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtmenge der im betrachteten Zeitraum verkauften Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La quantité totale d'unités vendues au cours de la période considérée.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad total de unidades vendidas en el período considerado.

inputs.label: Additional Variable Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Any other variable costs per unit that are directly attributable to the product (e.g., shipping, packaging) and form part of cost of goods sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any other variable costs per unit that are directly attributable to the product (e.g., shipping, packaging) and form part of cost of goods sold.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ürüne doğrudan atfedilebilen diğer birim başına değişken maliyetler (örn. nakliye, paketleme) ve satılan malın maliyetinin bir parçası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alle anderen variablen Kosten pro Einheit, die direkt dem Produkt zuzurechnen sind (z. B. Versand, Verpackung) und Teil der Herstellungskosten der verkauften Waren sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tout autre coût variable par unité directement attribuable au produit (ex. expédition, emballage) et faisant partie du coût des marchandises vendues.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier otro costo variable por unidad directamente atribuible al producto (p. ej., envío, empaque) que forma parte del costo de los bienes vendidos.

inputs.label: Discount Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The average discount or price reduction given on the selling price, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average discount or price reduction given on the selling price, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış fiyatı üzerinden verilen ortalama indirim veya fiyat düşüşü, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der durchschnittliche Rabatt oder Preisnachlass auf den Verkaufspreis, ausgedrückt in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Remise ou réduction de prix moyenne accordée sur le prix de vente, exprimée en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: El descuento promedio o reducción de precio sobre el precio de venta, expresado como porcentaje.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
